cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE on)

file(GLOB_RECURSE jsijniprofiler_SRC CONFIGURE_DEPENDS *.cpp)

        jsijniprofiler
        SHARED

        jsijniprofiler
